code: import{useState}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{registerUser}from"../services/authService";import{useAuth}from"../context/AuthContext";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Register(){const[form,setForm]=useState({name:"",email:"",password:"",role:"CUSTOMER"});const[error,setError]=useState("");const{login}=useAuth();const navigate=useNavigate();const onSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{const data=await registerUser(form);login(data);navigate("/");}catch(err){setError("Registration failed");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:"form",onSubmit:onSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Register"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Name",value:form.name,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,name:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Email",value:form.email,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,email:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"Password",value:form.password,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,password:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("select",{value:form.role,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,role:e.target.value}),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"CUSTOMER",children:"Customer"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"VENDOR",children:"Vendor"})]}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:error}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Register"})]});}export default Register;
